log.context:
The script does **not** recursively copy all subdirectories. It syncs only a hardcoded list of specific files and one directory. Here is the relevant sync logic verbatim:

```bash
for f in settings.json settings.local.json; do
  if [ -f "$STAGING/$f" ]; then
    cp "$STAGING/$f" "$DEST/$f"
    echo "Synced $f"
  fi
done

if [ -f "$STAGING/installed_plugins.json" ]; then
  cp "$STAGING/installed_plugins.json" "$DEST/plugins/installed_plugins.json"
  echo "Synced plugins/installed_plugins.json"
fi...(truncated)
